channel.title: Dev-Tools on Tenkai
channel.description: Recent content in Dev-Tools on Tenkai

item.title: Tenkai Daily — March 20, 2026
item.description:
Model Releases

GLM-OCR Multilingual Optical Character Recognition Model — A vision‑language model built on the GLM architecture, fine‑tuned for OCR across Chinese, English, French, Spanish, Russian, German, Japanese, and Korean. MIT licensed, Safetensors/Transformers ready, with arxiv paper 2603.10.

Open Source Releases

  • chandra — Layout‑aware OCR that preserves tables, forms, and handwritten text while maintaining full document layout for higher accuracy on dense pages.
  • LangChain-MinerU 0.1.3 – PDF‑to‑Markdown Loader for LangChain — Loader that runs MinerU on PDFs, outputting structured Markdown with headings, tables, and code blocks; ideal for feeding clean text into RAG pipelines.
  • Jupyter AI Extension 1.0.0 – Multi‑LLM Support for Notebooks — Sidebar lets you switch between OpenAI GPT, Claude, Gemini inside a notebook, triggering code generation, explanation, or debugging via natural‑language prompts.
  • ty — Rust‑based Python type checker and language server delivering near‑instant feedback on type errors, boosting productivity in large ML codebases.
  • TaxHacker — Self‑hosted AI accounting app that uses LLMs to parse receipts, invoices, and transactions; keeps data local and extensible via plugins.
  • Aye Chat: Terminal-first AI Code Generator — Terminal UI for prompting AI models to emit code snippets, integrating directly with local development workflows to speed up coding.
  • IntentKit 0.13.0 – Core Package for Intent-based AI Agents — Framework for building agents around user intents, providing recognition, dialogue, action modules and improved async support.

Research Worth Reading

  • Efficient Dense Crowd Trajectory Prediction Via Dynamic Clustering — Introduces a dynamic clustering method to predict trajectories in occluded crowds, improving scalability and accuracy for safety‑critical applications like stampede prevention.

AI Dev Tools

  • vllm-omni — Extension of vLLM for efficient omni‑modality inference (vision‑language, audio‑language) with optimized memory usage and batching.
  • adk-python — Google’s Agent Development Kit in Python; offers modular planning, tool use, and memory components compatible with various LLM backends.
  • huggingface/skills — Toolkit giving agents abilities to load, infer, and fine‑tune Hugging Face models; includes abstractions for prompt chaining, RAG, and tool use.
  • apm — Microsoft’s Agent Package Manager for discovering, installing, and versioning AI agent packages across teams.
  • anthropics/skills — Community‑driven skills repository for Claude agents (web search, code execution, data analysis) encouraging reuse and sharing.
  • warp — GPU‑kernel framework for accelerated simulation, data generation, and spatial computing; enables differentiable physics for ML research.
  • opencode — Open‑source coding agent that assists with generation, debugging, and refactoring via natural language, IDE‑agnostic and multi‑language.
  • claude-code v2.1.80 adds rate limit display and inline plugin settings — Adds a rate_limits field to statusline scripts and lets you declare plugins inline in settings.json, improving visibility and extensibility.
  • oh-my-openagent — Harness (formerly oh-my-opencode) that standardizes integrating LLM agents into dev workflows, with logging, monitoring, and easy backend swapping.
  • figma-console-mcp — Bridge exposing a Figma design system as an API, allowing agents to read, create, and debug UI components programmatically.

MCP Servers & Integrations

  • AgentMail MCP Server — Provides AI agents with their own email inbox API (via Gmail) to send, receive, and manage

item.title: Tenkai Daily — March 19, 2026
item.description:
Model Releases

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16 — 120B parameter MoE language model in BF16, supporting European/Asian languages with Azure deployment.

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-NVFP4 — 8-bit NVFP4 quantized variant of Nemotron 3 Super for efficient inference.

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-FP8 — FP8 precision version optimized for high-throughput inference with Azure deployment.

Jackrong/Qwen3.5-27B-Claude-4.6-Opus-Reasoning-Distilled — Distilled reasoning model emulating Claude 4.6 Opus capabilities for logical tasks.

Tesslate/OmniCoder-9B — Image-to-text-to-text coding agent for conversational code assistance.

Lightricks/LTX-2.3 — Video generation suite supporting text/image/audio-to-video transformations.
